verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) Multiple behavioral assertions — the test asserts spawn_agent (step 1), gate_review (step 4), accepted=false (step 5), and ask_human (step 6); only the final ask_human assertion is the behavioral target, the rest are setup that should use only is_error() guards without asserting action types. (2) Semantic types — work_item_id is captured and passed as raw String without being validated through WorkItemId; domain semantic types (WorkItemId, ReviewerId) should be used in test code even when GateParams ultimately accepts String.
